meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v20 Vast
meta.description: Building next-generation surgical care. Dr. Jorge Arce — board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon, South Bay.

sections.caption: The South Bay's referral destination for the complex cases.

sections.quote: Difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.
sections.sub: Dr. Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California — twenty-seven years devoted entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery, and to the procedures most surgeons refer out.

rows.name: Dental Implants
rows.desc: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.

rows.name: Reconstruction
rows.desc: Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.

rows.name: Complex Cases
rows.desc: The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.

rows.name: Implant Maintenance
rows.desc: Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.

rows.name: Pathology
rows.desc: Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.

rows.name: Second Opinions
rows.desc: Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

cells.d: Dedicated to oral & maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology.
Dental Implants Center of South Bay — Redondo Beach & Torrance.

quote.q: "I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows."

cards.t: What full-arch All-On-X reconstruction actually involves, step by step
How to prepare for a complex extraction — and what recovery looks like
When a second opinion is worth it: questions to ask any surgeon

sections.title: Create your treatment plan.
sections.body: Every case starts the same way: a conversation, imaging, and an honest assessment of what the case actually needs. No volume medicine — a plan built for you.
